# sux — machine index (llms.txt)
# Generated by scripts/gen-wiki.mjs — do not edit by hand; run `npm run wiki`.
# Terse Claude-optimized companion to the human wiki (start: Home.md).
# 83 notes · 100 functions. Legend: shipped|designed|draft|parked|meta|reference.
# The SUX pivot made the knowledge-store the core and PARKED the web-retrieval/algebra program.

## Docs by cluster

### namespaces
- [[files]] (shipped) — The files blob namespace — unblocked App-folder workspace (Mode A) + gated in-place corpus ops (Mode B); files_operate moves zero bytes through the model.
- [[jmap]] (shipped) — The full JMAP protocol as one typed conduit verb forwarding raw batches to Fastmail; _jmap.ts session/limit engine; MaskedEmail/Contacts/Calendars.
- [[mail]] (shipped) — A dozen ergonomic mail_* verbs over the jmap conduit — scheduled send, remote search, batching, pagination; open 13-fns-vs-one decision.
- [[three-mcps]] (shipped) — One Worker, N per-domain /mcp connectors — vault, mail, and files all shipped + live; the lifecycle + oracle (recall) are Claude-side skills / a server verb.
- [[domains]] (designed) — Maps nine personal-data domains onto vault-hub + conduit verbs; derives the unblocked/gated law from reversibility; three transport classes.
- [[sux-verbs]] (designed) — Collapses ~90 leaf fns into ten front-door verbs + batch/pipe; handle discipline (references-not-payloads) makes the shared fan-out/reduce cheap.
- [[vault-backends]] (designed) — Locks four vault backends + git-as-the-sync-bus; adds 3-way task sync (vault-Todoist-JMAP) and citation management on the same store verbs.

### knowledge
- [[vault-docs-reconciliation]] (designed) — Two SoT repos, one Obsidian view: gitignored symlink mounts public docs/ into the private vault; repo reaches the vault via the /vault/mcp tools; no cross-repo copy, so no divergence.
- [[knowledge-core]] (designed) — Decisions-only spec for the personal knowledge store — transport-agnostic vault ops, PARA+MOC nav, memory frontmatter, the six-verb lifecycle.
- [[style-edit]] (parked) — style learns a writing voice / edit rewrites to it; closed style-dimension taxonomy as the injection boundary; owns the voice kind on _kb.ts.
- [[teach-ask]] (parked) — teach writes / ask reads over a per-topic KB with agentic acquisition + Obsidian projection; owns _kb.ts v3; supersedes and deletes oracle.

### infrastructure
- [[architecture]] (shipped) — Diagrams of the SHIPPED vault system — hub-and-spoke Worker + ~95 fns, git-as-truth + KV read-through cache, two-transport routing, ingest dataflow.
- [[vpc-hosting]] (designed) — Move the live vault off the sleeping Mac onto always-on boxes via Workers VPC; three tiers, phases A-E; routes tier-3 OAuth through the sux Worker.
- [[platform-upgrades]] (parked) — Five infra upgrades as one substrate — notify/diff/job (scheduler + cron drain), mac-LLM tier, browse, Cloudflare Workflows, entity resolution.
- [[keys]] (reference) — Canonical registry of every secret/binding sux uses + the ones the new plan needs, where each lives, and how to get it.
- [[token-setup]] (reference) — Per-service, step-by-step generation of the personal-data tokens the sux namespaces need — where to click, which read-only vs read/write scope to pick, and the exact secret name + command. Values never live in the repo.
- [[phone-setup]] (reference) — How to add the sux connectors (sux / vault / mail / files) to claude.ai on your phone, what's live right now, and the memory workflow to drive it.

### operations
- [[enterprise-ops]] (designed) — The cross-store WRITE/ACT layer (mirror of oracle's read) — pass-by-reference + batch verbs + Claude-Code scheduler + skills; heavy operate substrate deferred.
- [[shrink-attachments]] (reference) — A worked recipe, not a cron.

### algebra
- [[algebra]] (parked) — Server-side map/filter/reduce/augment over a records[] envelope; splits a pure (cacheable) algebra from an effectful (subrequest-capped) one + a per-request ledger.

### retrieval
- [[search]] (parked) — One retrieval verb over web/research/social/retail backends with a string WHERE-DSL; emits the records envelope so combinators compose.
- [[shop]] (parked) — Cross-retailer price comparison over the shared retail fan-out — entity resolution, unit price, deal overlay, true freshness; owns _retail_fanout.ts.
- [[travel]] (parked) — One fn producing a flights/hotels/attractions/visa/price-trend dossier from Amadeus; two-phase DAG; visa harm-avoidance (refuse, don't guess).

### meta
- [[ITERATION-LOG]] (parked) — Changelog of the 13-round/104-improvement adversarial refinement that hardened the parked retrieval corpus; provenance, not spec.
- [[ROADMAP]] (meta) — Coherence anchor for the PARKED web/algebra program — shared-substrate owner table, frozen interfaces, build order; home of the two hard facts (60s deadline, 24h stale-grace).
- [[HANDOFF]] (meta) — Rolling single-file session handoff (git history holds prior versions); current content is mostly ephemeral or superseded.
- [[SUX]] (meta) — The pivot — declares the git-markdown knowledge store the core and everything else thin tools on top; parks the web-retrieval/algebra corpus.
- [[claude-profile-snippet]] (reference) — Compact snippet to paste into the claude.ai Profile so chats without skills can still route to sux tools.
- [[wiki-protocol]] (reference) — How this wiki stays true to the code and the work.
- [[one-shot-spec]] (reference) — A single self-contained prompt that reconstructs sux from zero — the architecture, the four namespaces, the safety model, and the house rules, compressed to the minimum an agent needs to one-shot it.
- [[wiki-conventions]] (reference) — The rules every wiki note obeys so the vault stays coherent and the generator

## Concept graph
- [[connector-surface-policy]] (shipped) — The sux marketplace ships two plugins today, each pinned to one endpoint on the same Worker.
- [[content-addressed-cache]] (shipped) — Every cacheable fn in the [[fn-registry]] gets a KV entry keyed by cacheKey: a sha256 of the fn name (namespaced ::summarize when the universal summarize flag is set) plus a stably-stringified copy of its normalized arguments — same inputs, same key, regardless of key order.
- [[fanout]] (parked) — The shared parallel-dispatch core, sux/src/fns/_fanout.ts, extracted from three hand-rolled Promise.allSettled loops so every fan-out verb gets error isolation and ledger accounting for free.
- [[fetch-ladder]] (shipped) — Cloudflare Workers egress from datacenter IPs, and datacenter IPs get blocked on reputation alone — residential egress is why sux exists at all.
- [[filter-dsl]] (parked) — A string WHERE-expression grammar, sux/src/fns/_filter.ts, owned by [[search]] and consumed by the [[verb-algebra]]'s standalone filter fn as a co-signed freeze — one grammar, two callers, never two forks.
- [[fn-registry]] (shipped) — Every one of sux's fns is a single Fn object: {name, description, inputSchema, cacheable?, cost?, ttl?, raw?, run} (registry.ts).
- [[handle-discipline]] (designed) — The LOCKED cross-cutting rule that shapes every store-facing verb in the sux design: references, not payloads.
- [[jmap-conduit]] (designed) — One generic jmap verb: a typed conduit that forwards raw JMAP batches to a JMAP endpoint (Fastmail today), adding only the five things an edge proxy is uniquely positioned to add — injected auth, cached Session discovery, transparent limit-safe batching/pagination, mutation gates, and composability with the sux [[verb-algebra]].
- [[kb-substrate]] (parked) — _kb.ts v3, the shared storage layer both teach/ask and style/edit write knowledge bases through.
- [[mcp-gate]] (shipped) — A local Node process (gate.mjs, run under launchd) on the Mac that fronts LIVE local MCP servers — today the Obsidian Local REST API — for remote Claude clients, injecting upstream bearer tokens Mac-side from routes.json so they never leave the machine (bearer files are re-read per request, so key rotation needs no restart).
- [[mychart]] (draft) — Separate draft (PR #31, not started) — pull health data via two pipes: clinical records over Epic SMART-on-FHIR + Apple Watch vitals via Health Auto Export; adds PHI invariants.
- [[namespace-architecture]] (designed) — The corrected shape of the whole system: one Worker, one OAuth flow, N connector namespaces, each exposed as its own /<domain>/mcp endpoint with its own Claude Code plugin.
- [[oauth-gate]] (shipped) — One @cloudflare/workers-oauth-provider instance, built lazily on first request, guards the whole Worker: apiRoute: ["/mcp", "/vault/mcp"] names both connector paths, apiHandler is rtServer, and defaultHandler is the GitHub OAuth flow (github-handler.ts).
- [[oracle-supersession]] (designed) — A tracked history of which layer holds the "read crown" — the cross-store synthesis-and-cite authority — as the design evolves, so readers of the corpus trust the right document rather than the first one they find.
- [[records-envelope]] (parked) — The shared contract every algebra and retrieval verb emits: {records: Rec[], meta}, owned by sux/src/fns/_records.ts.
- [[six-verb-lifecycle]] (designed) — The operating verb set for knowledge work over the vault: capture / triage / link / retrieve / consolidate / remember.
- [[two-hard-facts]] (meta) — Two Worker platform constants that every fan-out and every caching decision in the sux design has to respect, because nothing about them can be negotiated away.
- [[unblocked-gated-law]] (designed) — The governance law that decides which actions Claude may take without confirmation across every sux domain: "unblocked where git can undo; gated where the world can't." A reversible action — anything landing as a git commit, or anything living inside a credential-scoped folder with its own version history — runs freely, no confirm dance.
- [[vault-backends-matrix]] (designed) — Four implementations behind the obsidian fn's backend dispatch, covering the stateful notes namespace served at /vault/mcp.
- [[vault-stack]] (shipped) — A git-backed Obsidian knowledge store, OBSIDIAN_VAULT_REPO (live: colinxs/obsidian-vault) — every write is a commit, so git history is the undo.
- [[verb-algebra]] (parked) — Four generic combinators — map, filter, reduce, augment — operating over the [[records-envelope]] instead of one bespoke fn per data shape.

## Functions (100, universal /mcp surface)
- Net / transport: scrape, proxy, geo_fetch, redirects, robots, crawl
- Extract / parse: extract, readability, grep, select, metadata, tables, feed, sitemap, contacts, subtitles
- Convert: image_convert, csv, fillable, html, json, markdown, pdf, xml, yaml
- Compress / encode / data: compress, archive, encode, hash
- Token optimization: pack, declutter
- Text / AI: summarize, entities, redact, translate, classify, ocr
- Batching / composition: batch, batch_fetch, pipe
- Storage (KV): kv_get, kv_put, kv_list, kv_delete, store
- Feedback / meta: issue
- Query / APIs: search, wayback, shop, web_search
- Mail (JMAP): jmap
- Memory / recall: recall
- Other: ace, amazon, arxiv, bestbuy, citation, clinical_trials, coingecko, controld, costco, crossref, dropbox, ebay, facebook, find_similar, fn, fontcase, homedepot, ingest, kroger, learn, linkedin, lowes, mail_triage, obsidian, openalex, oracle, people, people_finder, places, preferences, product_search, pubmed, reddit, render, selftest, semantic_scholar, stackexchange, suggest, sux, tailscale, tavily, todoist, voice, walmart, watch, weekly_ad, winco, youtube
